name: superpage-merchant-agent
description: Autonomous merchant agent for the x402 payment protocol: enables AI agents and humans to discover, pay for, and access digital resources (APIs, files, articles, pay-per-second video) using on-chain USDC micro-payments on Arc (Circle's stablecoin-native L1, where USDC is also the gas token).

skills.name: Resource Access via x402
skills.description: Access payment-gated resources (APIs, files, articles) with USDC micro-payments on Arc. Agent receives HTTP 402, extracts payment requirements, executes on-chain transfer, and gains access.
examples: Access a premium weather API endpoint
Unlock a gated research article for 0.50 USDC
Download a dataset behind an x402 paywall

skills.name: Pay-Per-Second Video Streaming
skills.description: Watch videos and pay only for seconds consumed via the StreamPay payment channel on Arc: openSession with a native-USDC deposit and an ephemeral session key, sign per-second vouchers off-chain, closeSession settles once on-chain, and the unwatched remainder is refunded (reclaimExpired after 24h as a safety valve). Endpoints: GET /stream/meta/{slug}, POST /stream/session/register, POST /stream/session/{id}/heartbeat, POST /stream/session/{id}/close; playback at /watch/{slug}.
examples: Open a streaming session for a 0.001 USDC/second video
Watch 30 seconds of a tutorial and settle for exactly 0.03 USDC
Reclaim a deposit 24h after an unsettled session

skills.name: Pay-Per-Read Articles
skills.description: Read Notion-style articles published on SuperPage. Free preview blocks are available without payment at /read/{slug}; the full article unlocks with a single x402 USDC payment via GET /x402/resource/{slug}.
examples: Preview the free blocks of an article before buying
Pay 0.10 USDC to read the full guide
Fetch the article excerpt for summarization

skills.name: Shopify Product Purchase
skills.description: Purchase physical and digital products from Shopify stores using on-chain USDC payments on Arc. Supports product browsing, cart creation, and checkout.
examples: Buy a t-shirt from the x402 shop
Browse products and purchase with USDC

skills.name: AP2 Mandate-Based Shopping
skills.description: Full AP2 mandate flow: receive IntentMandate, return CartMandate with W3C PaymentRequest, verify PaymentMandate with x402 proof, issue PaymentReceipt.
examples: Send IntentMandate: 'I want a weather API under $1'
Submit PaymentMandate with on-chain tx hash

skills.name: On-Chain Trust & Reputation (ERC-8004)
skills.description: Register agent identity, query reputation scores, submit feedback, and verify trust via ERC-8004 Trustless Agents registries on Arc.
examples: Register this agent on-chain with ERC-8004
Submit feedback after a successful purchase

skills.name: Creator Marketplace
skills.description: Discover creators and their monetized resources. Search by keyword, browse catalogs, preview pricing before committing to payment. Product detail pages at /r/{slug}.

supportedChains.note: Headline chain. USDC is the native gas token; per-second video streaming settles here.
Second pay option. Article/file/API purchases settle here; gas is ETH. Streaming is Arc-only.

multichain.note: A 402 response lists one entry per supported chain in its accepts[] array. The buyer picks one, pays that chain's USDC, and returns the tx hash with the matching network + chainId. chainId is authoritative.
multichain.select: Match an accepts[] entry by chainId, pay its USDC contract on that chain, then retry with X-PAYMENT { transactionHash, network, chainId }.

surfaces.name: Web App
surfaces.description: Next.js marketplace frontend for browsing creators, reading articles, watching pay-per-second video, and managing stores

surfaces.name: MCP Server (Claude Desktop)
surfaces.description: 30+ tools for autonomous resource discovery, payment, and ERC-8004 trust operations

surfaces.name: Standalone AI Agent
surfaces.description: CLI agent supporting Anthropic, OpenAI, and Google LLMs for autonomous shopping

surfaces.name: Telegram Bot
surfaces.description: OpenClaw gateway for conversational resource access
